subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 741448122/240630575 is not a GRB
body:
L. Scotton (UAH) reports on behalf of the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 741448122/240630575 at 13:48:37.05 UT
on 30 June 2024, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact not due
to a GRB. This trigger is likely due to SAA entry."
